summary: Complete testing of auto-calculation of payment deadlines (scadenze) for received invoices. All 10 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed: (1) 'Ricalcola Scadenze' button exists with data-testid='btn-recalc-scadenze', (2) 'Scadenza' column visible in the fatture ricevute table, (3) Clicking button calls API and displays toast with linked/updated counts. Real-world test with production data successfully linked 18 suppliers and calculated 17 due dates.

backend_recalc_endpoint.details: Returns 200 with linked/updated counts. Successfully links suppliers by name and calculates due dates.

backend_calc_scadenza_helper.details: Correctly handles: A VISTA (0 days), 30gg (no FM), 30gg FM (end of month), 30gg FM+10 (extra_days after EOM)

backend_name_matching.feature: Supplier name matching for unlinked invoices
backend_name_matching.details: Case-insensitive matching, strips legal suffixes (SRL, SPA, SNC, etc). 'VEGA CARBURANTI SPA' correctly matches 'Vega carburanti'

backend_auto_calc_on_create.feature: Auto-calc scadenza when creating FR with supplier
backend_auto_calc_on_create.details: POST /api/fatture-ricevute with fornitore_id automatically calculates data_scadenza_pagamento

backend_multiple_installments.details: Uses max(giorni) from quote array for due date calculation

frontend_scadenza_column.feature: Scadenza column in fatture ricevute table
frontend_scadenza_column.details: Column header 'Scadenza' visible, displays calculated dates or '-' for missing

frontend_recalc_button.details: Button visible, clickable, calls API and displays toast notification

frontend_toast_notification.feature: Success toast after recalc API call
frontend_toast_notification.details: Shows 'X fornitori collegati, Y scadenze calcolate' or info message when nothing to update

real_data_test.details: Successfully linked 18 suppliers and calculated 17 due dates for real invoices

test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test_scadenze_*, test_recalc_* users/sessions
seed_data_creation: Test payment types, suppliers, and FR created during tests, all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-calculation of scadenze feature fully functional. Key locations: (1) backend/routes/fatture_ricevute.py:20-50 - _calc_scadenza_from_supplier helper, (2) backend/routes/fatture_ricevute.py:1300-1358 - recalc-scadenze endpoint, (3) frontend FattureRicevutePage.js:195-210 - handleRecalcScadenze function, (4) frontend FattureRicevutePage.js:336-345 - Ricalcola Scadenze button. The feature supports: A VISTA (0 days), simple day terms, fine_mese (end of month), extra_days (FM+N), and name matching for unlinked suppliers.
